description: Implement the complete CRDT sync engine: Yjs document wrapper, Yjs array/list wrapper, structured state management, sync protocol (WebSocket + HTTP fallback), conflict resolution, IndexedDB local store, service worker for offline queuing, and sync status management. All with comprehensive tests.
steps: Create packages/sync-engine/src/crdt-document.ts - A Yjs Doc wrapper class that supports creating/editing text, maps, and arrays. Provide methods: getText(name), getMap(name), getArray(name), applyUpdate(update: Uint8Array), getStateVector(), encodeState(). Emit events on changes. Use Zod schemas for configuration validation.

Create packages/sync-engine/src/crdt-list.ts - A Yjs Array wrapper for ordered lists (feeds, messages). Methods: push(item), insert(index, item), delete(index), get(index), toArray(), length, observe(callback). Support merging from remote updates.

Create packages/sync-engine/src/automerge-state.ts - Structured state management for user preferences and app state using Yjs Maps. Methods: get(key), set(key, value), subscribe(key, callback), getSnapshot(), applySnapshot(data). Include Zod schema validation for state shapes.

Create packages/sync-engine/src/sync-protocol.ts - WebSocket-based sync protocol with HTTP polling fallback. Class SyncProtocol with connect(url), disconnect(), send(message), onMessage(handler). Implement reconnection with exponential backoff. Fallback to HTTP polling when WebSocket fails. Use Zod for message schemas.

Create packages/sync-engine/src/conflict-resolution.ts - CRDT merge strategies. Since Yjs handles conflict resolution automatically, this module provides: mergeUpdates(updates[]), resolveConflict(local, remote) for non-CRDT data, and a ConflictResolver class with configurable strategies (last-write-wins, merge, custom).

Create packages/sync-engine/src/local-store.ts - IndexedDB persistence layer for offline data. Class LocalStore with methods: save(key, data), load(key), delete(key), listKeys(), clear(). Store pending actions queue. Track sync state metadata. Use a mock/interface-based approach since no real IndexedDB in Node tests.

Create packages/sync-engine/src/service-worker.ts - Background sync registration and offline request queuing. Class ServiceWorkerManager with methods: register(), unregister(), queueRequest(request), getQueuedRequests(), replayQueue(), clearQueue(). Interface-based for testability.

Create packages/sync-engine/src/sync-status.ts - Status indicator with states: synced, syncing, offline, conflict. Class SyncStatusManager with methods: getStatus(), subscribe(callback), transition(newStatus). Enforce valid state transitions. Emit events on change.
Update packages/sync-engine/src/index.ts to export all public APIs from all modules with proper type exports.
Create packages/sync-engine/src/__tests__/crdt-document.test.ts - Tests: create document, edit text, merge updates from two sources without conflict, get state vector, encode/decode state.
Create packages/sync-engine/src/__tests__/crdt-list.test.ts - Tests: push items, insert at index, delete, merge from remote, concurrent edits merge correctly.
Create packages/sync-engine/src/__tests__/automerge-state.test.ts - Tests: get/set values, subscribe to changes, snapshot/restore, schema validation.
Create packages/sync-engine/src/__tests__/sync-protocol.test.ts - Tests: connect/disconnect lifecycle, message sending, reconnection logic, HTTP fallback activation, message schema validation.
Create packages/sync-engine/src/__tests__/conflict-resolution.test.ts - Tests: merge multiple updates, last-write-wins strategy, custom resolver, Yjs automatic merge.
Create packages/sync-engine/src/__tests__/local-store.test.ts - Tests: save/load/delete operations, queue pending actions, list keys, clear store.
Create packages/sync-engine/src/__tests__/service-worker.test.ts - Tests: register/unregister, queue requests when offline, replay queue on reconnect, clear queue.
Create packages/sync-engine/src/__tests__/sync-status.test.ts - Tests: initial status, valid transitions (online->offline->syncing->synced), invalid transitions rejected, subscription notifications.
Verify all tests pass with NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run and typecheck passes with pnpm --filter @quant/sync-engine typecheck.
acceptance_criteria: Yjs document wrapper: create, edit text/map/array, merge updates from two sources without data loss
Yjs list wrapper: push, insert, delete, merge concurrent edits from remote
State management: get/set with Zod validation, subscribe, snapshot/restore
Sync protocol: WebSocket connect with reconnection, HTTP polling fallback, Zod message schemas
Conflict resolution: mergeUpdates combines Yjs updates, LWW and custom strategies for non-CRDT data
Local store: IndexedDB interface for save/load/delete/queue with offline action storage
Service worker: register, queue offline requests, replay on reconnect
Status manager: synced/syncing/offline/conflict states with valid transitions and subscriptions
All test files exist in src/__tests__/ and pass
TypeScript strict mode passes with no errors
100 offline actions can be queued and replayed correctly (tested)
findings: All 77 tests pass. TypeScript strict mode passes cleanly. Prettier formatting applied via pre-commit hook. Key design decisions: (1) Used z.input for config types to allow optional fields with defaults. (2) AutomergeState validates individual fields via schema.shape access rather than full-object validation to support incremental state building. (3) SyncProtocol uses interface-based WebSocket factory for testability. (4) LocalStore uses IStorageBackend interface with InMemoryStorageBackend for testing.
